description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Linux_x86_64_SDL1 that triggers on push and pull request events. The workflow should have two jobs: prebuild and build. The prebuild job checks if the workflow should be skipped using fkirc/skip-duplicate-actions. If not skipped, the build job runs on ubuntu-20.04, checks out the repository, installs dependencies, configures CMake for a nightly build with SDL1, builds the project, and uploads the executable and package as artifacts.
